extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming water damage (liquid stain) on the laptop screen.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a laptop screen with extensive splotchy patterns consistent with water damage or a stain.
The image shows a laptop screen with faint, widespread discoloration or patterns, but the details are less clear due to blurriness and distance.

result.user_claim: Customer: I am confused if this is a reflection or actual damage, but after rain travel the screen looked stained. | Support: Should we review this as liquid damage? | Customer: Yes, screen liquid stain. | Support: Not keyboard? | Customer: Correct, screen only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed screen with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed screen with visible water_damage. Supporting images: img_1.
